channel.title: scraping on Sean
channel.description: Recent content in scraping on Sean

item.title: The fast food capital
item.description: If you love fast food, where should you live? You’d want to live somewhere with lots of takeaways, ideally all fairly close to each other. Lucky for you, there’s a fair bit of choice! If you want to live in England then London’s you’re best bet, or you can go to the midlands (Birmingham) or up North (Blackpool or Leeds). If you’re looking for a place to live in Wales, Bute Park in Cardiff has loads of takeaways, and for Scotland you can’t go wrong with Central Glasgow:
